notes:
Initial shadow manifest for P2 ComfyUI promotion gate. Populate `bindings` via `python -m backend.scripts.compute_manifest_hashes --write`, then transition `promotion_state` along the rollout path (shadow -> p10 -> p25 -> p50 -> p100) per plan §P2.4. Rollout states (p10+) require `approver` + non-expired `approved_at`.

Valid `scope`: production | staging | canary.
Valid `promotion_state`: shadow | p10 | p25 | p50 | p100 | rolled_back (aligned with plan §P2.4 渐进灰度路径).

`rollback_baseline.bindings` captures the previously-approved hash set so a rolled_back promotion can revert atomically; `rollback_baseline.manifest_ref` should be a git SHA or absolute path pointing to the prior manifest snapshot.
